CREATE TABLE test_sleep (id UInt32, val String);
SELECT id, sleepEachRow(2.5) AS sleep_time FROM test_sleep WHERE id > 1;
SELECT id, val, sleepEachRow(0.1) FROM test_sleep WHERE val LIKE 'a%';
SELECT id, sleepEachRow(3) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_sleep WHERE id < 4);
SELECT sleepEachRow(1.5) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT val FROM test_sleep) AS subquery;
WITH (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_sleep) AS max_id SELECT sleepEachRow(3), max_id FROM test_sleep;
CREATE TABLE other_table (id UInt32, description String);
SELECT ts.id, ts.val, sleepEachRow(0.75) FROM test_sleep ts JOIN other_table ot ON ts.id = ot.id;
SELECT sleepEachRow(2.999), COUNT(*) FROM test_sleep GROUP BY id;
SELECT sleepEachRow(0) AS sleep_val FROM test_sleep;
SELECT sleepEachRow(1), (SELECT count() FROM test_sleep) AS count_rows FROM test_sleep;
